description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.5.0-jdk-8 Docker image with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a compile job in the build stage that runs mvn compile --batch-mode and archives target/*.jar as a 7‑day artifact. Add a verify job (implicitly in the test stage) that runs mvn verify --batch-mode and also stores target/*.jar as a 7‑day artifact. Add a publish job in the deploy stage that runs only on tag pipelines, executes mv target/*.jar, and publishes the resulting *.jar files as a 7‑day artifact on success. Add a blameMail job in the deploy stage that runs only on the develop branch, executes ./mailToDeveloper.sh, and triggers only when the pipeline fails.
